name: Tarot Readings Premium
short_description: The most beautiful tarot card reading experience on Steam. 78 stunning hand-crafted animated cards in 4K. Multiple spreads including Celtic Cross, love & career readings. Multiplayer support for up to 5 users. 4K@120FPS*
detailed_description:
Tarot Readings Premium is the most visually stunning and fully animated tarot card experience available on any platform. With 78 beautifully hand-crafted cards — all animated in 4K — every reading feels immersive and authentic. Whether you're a seasoned tarot practitioner or a curious beginner, this app delivers a rich, atmospheric experience that draws you in from the first card flip.

🃏 THE FULL TAROT EXPERIENCE

Watch as the cards are shuffled before your eyes. Choose your cards, then see them revealed one by one with detailed explanations of their meaning. Every card in the 78-card deck features custom artwork designed exclusively for this app, rendered in stunning 4K resolution with smooth animations.

🔮 MULTIPLE READING TYPES

Explore different tarot spreads to gain insight into every area of your life:

✦ Celtic Cross — the classic 10-card spread for deep, comprehensive readings

✦ Love & Relationship readings

✦ Career & Work readings

✦ And more spreads to discover

Each reading provides detailed card-by-card interpretations to help you reflect, explore possibilities, and gain a fresh perspective on your questions.

🔄 BUY ONCE, ENJOY FOREVER

No subscriptions, no in-app purchases, no hidden costs. One purchase gives you the full experience — all 78 cards, all spreads, all features.

👥 SHARE THE EXPERIENCE

Tarot Readings Premium supports multiplayer — do readings for friends, compare cards, and explore the tarot together. Perfect for gatherings, sleepovers, or a mystical night in.

🎨 A WORK OF ART

Every detail has been crafted with care. The full 78-card deck was custom designed in 2019 exclusively for this app. The interface is luxurious and polished, earning a perfect 10/10 from reviewers who called it "the most stunning tarot application" they had ever seen.

Features:

✦ 4K 2D Cartoon - 4K@120FPS* / 4K@60FPS (* Requires >= 120Hz Monitor & 2.1 HDMI)

✦ Full 78-card tarot deck — every card custom designed and animated in 4K.

✦ Multiple tarot spreads: Celtic Cross, love, career and more.

✦ Detailed card-by-card interpretations for every reading.

✦ No subscriptions, no in-app purchases — one purchase, full experience.

✦ Multiplayer support — do readings with friends.

✦ Immersive, atmospheric presentation with card shuffling and reveals.

✦ Steam Achievements included.

✦ Translated into 9 languages (English, French, Italian, German, Spanish, Greek, Portuguese, Russian, Japanese).
